Amsterdam (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,947,969Details
International Box Office $16,297,841
Worldwide Box Office $31,245,810
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A story spanning eras and a comedic thriller about love, loyalty, and reasons to live in the face of amazing unknown true history, as it follows three tight friends and everyone they encounter on their adventure.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,444,896 (43.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$80,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,005 opening theaters/3,005 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $16,977,938

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 7th, 2022 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: October 6th, 2022 (Wide), released as Ámsterdam (Mexico)
October 6th, 2022 (Wide) (Thailand)
October 6th, 2022 (Wide) (Singapore)
October 6th, 2022 (Wide) (Philippines)
October 6th, 2022 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: November 11th, 2022 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for brief violence and bloody images.
(Rating bulletin 2745 (cert #53992), 8/17/2022)
Running Time: 134 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: Falsely Accused, Murder Mystery
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Social setting: Crime Caper
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Time period setting: 1930s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Regency Enterprises, 20th Century Studios
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English
